notes: Legacy-retirement Phase 0.5 — UN-STRAND #1: pg-master (Master file browse). The census found pg-master STRANDED: its cabinet-search / host-map / elevation BROWSE surface was reachable only via ?legacy=1 (the Profile/site-code editor half is already LIVE in the redesign via rd_openProfile). This ship gives the browse a redesign door, mirroring how Ghost Echo got its Crash-Cart card. TWO additive edits, body.rd-only: (1) a new 'MASTER FILE' rf-card in the redesign Work grid (#work-grid, cyan, right after MASTER DOC) -> onclick rd_openMasterFile(); (2) a tiny new rd_openMasterFile() helper next to rd_openProfile/rd_closeProfile that calls showPage('master') + master_showSection('file'), reusing the single canonical pg-master instance and its already-loaded window._lastPhantomMaster (empty-state renders the LOAD MASTER FILE CTA). NO new sheet, NO CSS, NO new asset (reuses the already-precached phantom-tool-masterdoc icon), NO deletion. The Profile/site editor door (MASTER DOC card + SYS->SITE PROFILE) is untouched; SITE_PROFILE_KEY/siteProfile_save not touched (dfw-01 stays). Legacy render path unchanged -> ?legacy=1 byte-identical (card lives in pg-work, a redesign-only page legacy never activates; helper is dormant JS). KNOWN MVP caveats (flagged, not fixed): pg-master renders with legacy styling (off-brand island inside the rd frame); its section bar still shows a 2nd 'Profile' pill (a redundant door to the same editor, last-write-wins, not corruption); the old 'MASTER DOC' card is arguably mislabeled (it opens the Profile editor) — a later 1-line relabel to 'SITE PROFILE' is John's call. DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD-STOP): Work tab shows a new cyan MASTER FILE card after MASTER DOC (grid now 10 cards); tap it -> lands on the cabinet-search/host-map surface with the File pill ACTIVE (banner + search + LIST/ELEVATION if a master is loaded, else the LOAD MASTER FILE CTA); redesign header + bottom 3-pill nav stay visible/tappable; BACK returns to Work (not a dead-end); MASTER DOC still opens the Site Profile sheet and a profile save still writes correctly; ?legacy=1 identical. ROLLBACK: revert the commit.
